reference_scope: aMule Kad bootstrap, refresh, source search, publish, and firewalled checks
acceptance: Current Kad one-shot and periodic behaviors are documented against aMule runtime expectations.
verification: aMule PartFile and DownloadQueue Kad source search timing plus current aria2-next Kad command/state paths inspected; progress.md records the one-shot source search gap.
notes: Kad routing health remains separate from file source search.

acceptance: Kad contacts are refreshed, expired, pinged, and bootstrapped through bounded durable scheduling.
verification: Ed2kKadStateTest::testRoutingBootstrapAndRefresh passed; useful routing size now counts replacement contacts for maintenance decisions.

reference_scope: aMule Kad file source search behavior
acceptance: Low-source files can trigger repeated bounded Kad source searches when routing state is usable.
verification: Ed2kKadStateTest::testKadSourceSearchCadence passed; source search state is persisted through Kad routing state and no longer depends on a command-lifetime one-shot gate.
notes: One-shot sourceSearchSent no longer blocks later discovery.

checkpoint: Harden Kad publish and firewalled checks
reference_scope: aMule source publish and firewalled checks
acceptance: Source publish and firewalled checks run only when local state and routing health make them useful.
verification: Ed2kHelperTest::testKadRoutingStatePayload and SessionSerializerTest::testSaveEd2kDownload passed for persisted publish, firewalled, and source-search state.
